author: w3Lb
content: WHY: 4 good libfuzzer targets (fuzz_regex_input, fuzz_engine, fuzz_json_request, fuzz_autodetect) exist but never run — found in the June 9 review; fuzzers that don't run rot. Coverage: no lcov/tarpaulin anywhere, so test-suite gaps are invisible. SCOPE: (1) CI fuzz smoke job: nightly toolchain + cargo-fuzz, run each target for ~60s with -max_total_time on PRs touching ripsed-core/ripsed-json (path filter), full 10-min run on a weekly cron; corpus committed under fuzz/corpus/ and grown from CI artifacts; crash artifacts uploaded on failure. (2) Coverage: cargo-llvm-cov in a CI job, lcov upload to Codecov (or just artifact + README badge if no external service wanted — decide with repo owner), threshold informational not blocking at first. TESTS: n/a — this IS test infra; acceptance = green jobs on a PR.
